page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance configured with an Intel Xeon 6462C processor. This x86_64 architecture CPU features 8 dedicated physical cores running at a base frequency of 3.3 GHz with one thread per core. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator for this instance is a single NVIDIA L20 GPU based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, which includes 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn8is.2xlarge offers a specialized hardware profile that balances dedicated Intel Xeon compute cores with a high-capacity 48 GB GPU frame buffer. This configuration is suitable for workloads requiring significant graphics memory but moderate CPU resources, such as mid-range AI inference, machine learning model fine-tuning, and GPU-accelerated data processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server designed for compute and graphics-intensive workloads. It features an Intel Xeon 6462C processor with 8 dedicated physical cores running at 3.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, offering a balanced 8.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside a single NVIDIA L20 GPU from the Ada Lovelace family, which provides 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. This hardware configuration is optimized for workloads that require substantial GPU memory relative to CPU resources, such as artificial intelligence inference, deep learning model execution, and specialized parallel computing tasks.
